0.content:
# 🔑 Active Directory — Password Changes
Tracks when and where user passwords were changed, including self-service changes (4723) and admin resets (4724).

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4723")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4723") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "4723", "User Change Attempt", else: "Admin Reset")
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:5m

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4723")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:SubjectAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, SubjectAccount, TargetAccount, TargetDomain
| filterOut contains(SubjectAccount, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:AdminAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL
//DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
//DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AdminAccount, TargetAccount
//| filterOut contains(SubjectAccount, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:AdminAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL
//DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
//DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AdminAccount, TargetAccount
| summarize ResetCount = count(), by:AdminAccount
| sort ResetCount desc

15.content: # Top Users Whose Passwords Were Reset

16.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:AdminAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL
//DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
//DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, AdminAccount, TargetAccount
| summarize ResetCount = count(), by:TargetAccount
| sort ResetCount desc

18.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4723") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4724")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:SubjectAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:SubjectDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:TargetAccount EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:TargetDomain EOL"""
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "4723", "User Change Attempt", else: "Admin Reset")
| filterOut contains(TargetAccount, "$")
| summarize LastChange = last(timestamp), LastDC = last(host.name), LastChangedBy = last(SubjectAccount), ChangeType = last(EventType), by:TargetAccount
| sort LastChange desc
